title: Google Ads API client
description: Build Python client for Google Ads API: Keyword Planner CPC estimates, campaign creation. See SPIKE-002 research.
close_reason: Implemented Google Ads API client with Keyword Planner, campaign management. 16 tests passing.

title: Product matching via UPC/EAN codes
description: Match identical products across platforms using barcode data as primary key

title: REST API for opportunity feed
description: Expose current opportunities via API for mobile app and external tools

title: Shipping cost estimator
description: Estimate shipping costs based on weight, dimensions, and origin/destination zip codes

title: Fee calculator per platform
description: Model seller fees for Amazon FBA, eBay, Walmart Marketplace including referral, fulfillment, and closing fees

title: Add profit margin calculator
description: Factor in fees, shipping, taxes for true margin

title: Product Discovery Service
description: Create service that fetches products from CJ, enriches with Keepa/Google Ads data, and converts to scoring Product model. src/ecom_arb/services/discovery.py

title: Dashboard for active opportunities
description: Real-time view of current arbitrage opportunities with filters

title: Set up price monitoring pipeline
description: Build scrapers for Amazon, eBay, Walmart price feeds

title: Tax liability tracker
description: Track nexus obligations and estimated sales tax per state

title: Walmart price feed integration
description: Connect to Walmart affiliate API for real-time pricing data

title: Build Amazon product scraper
description: Scrape product listings, prices, and availability from Amazon using rotating proxies

title: Build eBay listing scraper
description: Pull active listings with buy-it-now prices and shipping costs from eBay API

title: Competitor tracking module
description: Monitor other sellers on same listings to gauge competition intensity

title: Historical price chart per product
description: Store and visualize price history to identify seasonal patterns and trends

title: Rate limiter for API calls
description: Getting throttled on Amazon - need exponential backoff and request pooling

title: Database schema for price snapshots
description: Design TimescaleDB schema for storing millions of price data points efficiently

title: Alert system for high-margin opportunities
description: Real-time notifications when arbitrage spread exceeds configurable threshold

title: Keepa API client
description: Build Python client for Keepa API: product lookup, price history, buy box data. See SPIKE-004 research (Keepa alternative).

title: Implement arbitrage detection algorithm
description: Core logic to find profitable cross-platform price gaps

title: ROI calculator with holding period
description: Factor in capital lockup time, storage costs, and opportunity cost for true ROI

title: CJ Dropshipping API client
description: Build Python client for CJ API: auth, product catalog, freight calc, order creation. See SPIKE-003 research.
close_reason: Completed: CJ Dropshipping API client with auth, product queries, freight calc, and order creation. 23 tests passing.

title: Fix duplicate product matching
description: Same product showing as different items across platforms

title: Scoring Pipeline Service
description: Create service that takes discovered products, runs them through scorer, and saves to database. src/ecom_arb/services/pipeline.py
close_reason: Implemented scoring pipeline service with ScoredProduct DB model. 11 tests passing.

title: Scored Products API
description: Add API endpoints: GET /products/scored (list scored products), GET /products/{id}/score (get score for product). src/ecom_arb/api/routers/scored.py
close_reason: Implemented all three API endpoints: GET /products/scored, GET /products/{id}/score, POST /products/{id}/rescore. All 12 tests passing.

title: Fuzzy title matching fallback
description: NLP-based product title similarity for items without barcode matches
